negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing blocking canonical-state handler that processes async commitment transactions and then scheduled canonical-state processing in the same handler/order.
related_but_insufficient_code: process_blocking_canonical_state_change processes async commitments/settlements/expiry, and node blocking handlers call only that async pool hook. Scheduled work moved to payload building and verifier paths, not a combined canonical handler.

notes: Confirmed gap; async canonical processing exists but not the combined handler.
rationale: The candidate defines a current ordering requirement between async commitment handling and scheduled canonical-state processing.
statement: The blocking canonical-state handler must process async commitment transactions from a sealed block before running scheduled transaction canonical-state processing.
suggested_falsification_tests: Use an instrumented pool/handler for a canonical block containing async commitment and scheduled transactions and assert async commitment processing is invoked before scheduled canonical-state processing.
summary: Canonical handler async-then-scheduled ordering is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Instrument provider blocking canonical handler with async commitment and due scheduled work; current port lacks the scheduled callback after async processing.
title: Canonical handler processes async commitments first
